task: Find a help page about “how presale works” on ticketmaster.
final_result_response:
I have successfully found the help page about "how presale works" on Ticketmaster. Here are the details:

**Page Title:** "How do presales work?"

**URL:** https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9702132309905-How-do-presales-work

**Location in Help Center:** Ticketmaster Help > Buy Tickets > Presale

**Page Summary:** The page explains that "Presales give fans the opportunity to purchase tickets before the general sale. Depending on the type of presale, you may need to sign up to join the presale or get a code to access the ticket sale." 

The page includes expandable sections covering different types of presales:
1. **Artist Presale** 
2. **Presales with codes or sponsors**
3. **Fan Clubs**

I found this by navigating to the Ticketmaster Help Center (via the "Help" link in the top navigation), searching for "how presale works," and clicking the first result.
